svg.title: Merge cleanup flow
svg.desc: This flowchart explains how merged visual explanation SVGs are removed from main. A push to main after a PR merge starts the workflow. The workflow checks out the repository, runs the root github-actions deletion script, exits without committing when no scoped SVGs exist, or deletes SVG files under visual-explanations and commits the deletion as github-actions bot. The bot-triggered follow-up run is skipped to prevent an empty loop.
